summary: Vertical video set to music. Dark night-vision and handheld footage of CBP agents moving through a residential area at night, intercut with green-tinted aerial helicopter FLIR shots overlaid with a crosshair reticle and compass headings (S, W) over figures and a marked vehicle. On-screen music credit reads 'Young Jeezy - Soul Survivor' and an Instagram '@CBPAMO' handle appears throughout. It ends on a black card with the Instagram logo and '@CBPAMO'.

script.scene: Near-black night frame; an agent silhouetted against a red light, suburban houses faintly visible. On-screen music credit 'Young Jeezy - Soul Survivor' and Instagram '@CBPAMO' appear.
Dark handheld shot of an armed CBP agent in gear moving through a residential yard at night, lit by red and blue light; music credit and '@CBPAMO' overlaid.
Green-tinted aerial helicopter FLIR view with a crosshair reticle over figures and bursts of light below; '@CBPAMO' overlay.
Aerial view continues: compass headings (S, W) at top; reticle over agents with blue flashlight beams holding people beside a marked vehicle with red and blue lights on a road.
Fades to a black end card with the Instagram logo and '@CBPAMO' handle.

notable_text: On-screen: music credit 'Young Jeezy - Soul Survivor (E)'; '@CBPAMO' with Instagram logo throughout and on the closing black end card. Tweet: 'MAKING AMERICA SAFE AGAIN... we will hunt you down, arrest you, and lock you up. That's a promise.'
